parameters.jsCode: const input = $('Normalize Quote Input').first().json; const raw = $('HTTP - Predict Quote').first().json || {}; const apiError = raw.error ? String(raw.error) : ''; const result = raw.result || raw.data || raw; if (apiError || !result || typeof result !== 'object') { throw new Error(apiError || 'Empty or invalid quote API response'); } const lineItems = Array.isArray(result.line_items) ? result.line_items : []; const alternatives = Array.isArray(result.provider_alternatives) ? result.provider_alternatives : []; const totalQuote = Number(result.total_quote ?? 0); const baseCost = Number(result.base_estimated_cost ?? 0); const marginValue = Number(result.margin_value ?? 0); const targetMargin = Number(result.target_margin_percent ?? input.target_margin ?? 18); const clientName = String(result.client_name || input.client_name || 'Client').trim(); const eventType = String(result.event_type || input.event_type || '').trim(); const city = String(result.city || input.city || '').trim(); const summary = String(result.llm_summary || '').trim(); const quoteId = String(result.quote_id || '').trim(); return [{ json: { ...input, quote_id: quoteId, client_name: clientName, event_type: eventType, city, guests: Number(result.guests ?? input.guests ?? 0), base_estimated_cost: baseCost, target_margin_percent: targetMargin, margin_value: marginValue, total_quote: totalQuote, line_items: lineItems, provider_alternatives: alternatives, llm_summary: summary, notes: String(result.notes || input.extra_notes || ''), api_error: '' } }];

parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quote (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, quote_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, client_name VARCHAR(255) NULL, event_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, city VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL, guests INT NOT NULL, base_estimated_cost DOUBLE NOT NULL, target_margin_percent DOUBLE NOT NULL, margin_value DOUBLE NOT NULL, total_quote DOUBLE NOT NULL, line_items_json LONGTEXT NULL, provider_alternatives_json LONGTEXT NULL, llm_summary LONGTEXT NULL, notes LONGTEXT NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO quote (quote_id, client_name, event_type, city, guests, base_estimated_cost, target_margin_percent, margin_value, total_quote, line_items_json, provider_alternatives_json, llm_summary, notes, created_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.quote_id.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.client_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.event_type.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.city.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.guests }}, {{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.base_estimated_cost }}, {{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.target_margin_percent }}, {{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.margin_value }}, {{ $('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.total_quote }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.line_items || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.provider_alternatives || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.llm_summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($('Code - Normalize Quote Result').first().json.notes || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', NOW());

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, quote_id: $json.quote_id, total_quote: $json.total_quote, base_estimated_cost: $json.base_estimated_cost, target_margin_percent: $json.target_margin_percent } }}
